address.formatted: 2500 Wisconsin Ave NW, Ste 237, Washington, DC 20007

business.pricing: $225/hour with quarter-hour increments; fee-only with no commissions accepted

specialties: English, French, Continental, and American Art
certifications: Victoria & Albert Museum Study Centre Graduate

content.about: Mark Secrest is a veteran appraiser with a 49-year career, academically trained at London's Victoria & Albert Museum. He has provided appraisal services for the Reagan and Obama White House administrations, served on the DC Board of Appraisers, and is an acknowledged expert witness in federal and state courts. He regularly consults for major institutions like the Smithsonian, Phillips Collection, and Colonial Williamsburg. Specializes in English, French, Continental, and American art, antique furniture, silver, porcelains, and antiquities.
content.notes: Fee-only service with no commissions or gratuities accepted. Serves Washington DC and New York metropolitan areas.

content.about: Washingtonian Appraisals is a certified personal property appraisal firm serving the Washington, DC, Maryland, and Virginia region. They specialize in valuing individual heirlooms through entire estates and collections. All reports meet the compliance standards required by the IRS, courts, and insurance companies.
content.notes: Serves DC, Maryland, and Virginia metro area. No free appraisals; $175/hour with 2-hour minimum.

address.formatted: 1120 N Fairfax St, Alexandria, VA 22314 (Serves Washington DC)

business.yearsInBusiness: Established auction house and appraisal firm

content.about: The Potomack Company is a well-established auction house and appraisal firm serving the Washington DC metro area from their Alexandria location. They offer professional antique and fine art appraisals, auction services, and estate sales with walk-in consultations available.
content.notes: Located in Alexandria, VA but serves the greater Washington DC area. Walk-ins welcome during business hours.

address.formatted: 104 Talbot Ln, Easton, MD 21601 (Serves Washington DC)

content.about: Claiborne B. 'Clay' Beall has over three decades of experience as a personal property and antiques appraiser. He has completed appraisals for numerous prestigious museums and institutions, including the Smithsonian, Historical Society of Washington, Historical Annapolis Foundation, and Historic Fairfax City. All appraisals are conducted in strict compliance with USPAP standards and the ASA Code of Ethics.
content.notes: Serves Metropolitan Washington DC, Baltimore, Annapolis, Maryland's Eastern Shore, and Delaware.

address.formatted: 515 Dover Road, Suite 100, Rockville, MD 20850 (Serves Washington DC)

content.about: Weschler's Auctioneers & Appraisers has served the Washington DC metro area since 1890, now owned and operated by the 4th and 5th generations of the Weschler family. They are the leading auction house in the DC area, providing professional antique and fine art appraisals, estate tax valuations, and auction services. Their team includes ASA-accredited senior members specializing in fine art, Asian works of art, and decorative arts.
content.notes: Located in Rockville, MD but serves the greater Washington DC area. Established 1890, family-owned for five generations.

address.formatted: 5550 Friendship Boulevard, Ste T60, Chevy Chase, MD 20815 (Serves Washington DC)

content.about: Sloans & Kenyon is Metropolitan Washington DC's premier antiques and fine art auction house, with roots dating back to C.G. Sloan & Co. founded in 1853. They conduct estate catalogue auctions of fine art and antiques approximately five times each year, providing professional appraisal services for estate planning, insurance, charitable donations, and tax purposes.
content.notes: Located in Chevy Chase, MD but serves the greater Washington DC area. Historical roots trace back to 1853.

business.yearsInBusiness: Established art advisory and appraisal firm

content.about: Warwick Art Advisory is a full-service consulting firm based in Washington DC providing appraisals and consulting on acquisition, divestiture, and management of fine art and antiques. They serve collectors, estates, and institutions with expert valuations and advisory services for art and antique collections.
content.notes: Serves Washington DC and surrounding areas. Full-service art advisory and appraisal firm.

content.about: ValuePros Appraisal Services is a family-owned appraisal firm operating since 1976, providing independent, certified appraisal reports for Washington DC and surrounding areas. As accredited appraisers with no personal interest in clients' items (not buyers or dealers), they offer unbiased valuations for antiques, collectibles, fine art, jewelry, and personal property.
content.notes: Family owned since 1976. Independent appraisers - not buyers or dealers. Serves Washington DC and surrounding areas.
